MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Todd Goulding, Service Manager for Alouis Auto Radiator, Inc., Appellant/Defendant. Adebiyi Shamonda, Respondent/Plaintiff.

Cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Todd Goulding testifies on behalf of Alouis Auto Radiator, Inc., Appellant/Defendant.

Adebiyi Shamonda, Respondent/Plaintif testifies on his own behalf.

No new evidence is submitted.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk:M. Smith, Not Reported (503)
